nasb.text: Then the king’s face grew pale and his thoughts alarmed him, and his hip joints went slack and his knees began knocking together.

esv.text: Then the king’s color changed, and his thoughts alarmed him; his limbs gave way, and his knees knocked together.

cnv.text: 就臉色大變，心意驚惶，兩腳無力，雙膝彼此相碰。

ccb.text: 脸色骤变，惊恐万分，两腿发软，双膝颤抖。
